message:
fix(bootstrap): make genesis state write crash-safe via atomic rename with fsync

Write genesis to a .cbor.tmp temp file, call sync_all(), then
atomically rename over the real path. Add sync_directory() helper
(platform-aware: fsync on Unix, no-op on Windows). Clean up temp
file on failure. This eliminates the crash window where a partial
write could corrupt the genesis file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
